name: Body Fat Calculator
description: Industrial-grade body fat estimation tool using anthropometric measurements and lean manufacturing principles for health and ergonomic risk assessment.

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: Biological sex used in anthropometric regression models (ISO 7250-1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Biological sex used in anthropometric regression models (ISO 7250-1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Antropometrik regresyon modellerinde kullanılan biyolojik cinsiyet (ISO 7250-1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Biologisches Geschlecht, verwendet in anthropometrischen Regressionsmodellen (ISO 7250-1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sexe biologique utilisé dans les modèles de régression anthropométrique (ISO 7250-1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Sexo biológico utilizado en modelos de regresión antropométrica (ISO 7250-1).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجنس البيولوجي المستخدم في نماذج الانحدار الأنثروبومترية (ISO 7250-1).

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age affects body composition and metabolic rate (Six Sigma DMAIC phase: Measure).

businessContext_i18n.en: Age affects body composition and metabolic rate (Six Sigma DMAIC phase: Measure).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş, vücut kompozisyonunu ve metabolizma hızını etkiler (Altı Sigma DMAIC aşaması: Ölç).
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter beeinflusst Körperzusammensetzung und Stoffwechselrate (Six Sigma DMAIC-Phase: Messen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'âge affecte la composition corporelle et le métabolisme (phase Mesurer du Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad afecta la composición corporal y la tasa metabólica (fase Medir de Seis Sigma DMAIC).
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمر يؤثر على تكوين الجسم ومعدل الأيض (مرحلة القياس في ستة سيجما DMAIC).

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Stature measurement per ISO 7250-1 for normalization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stature measurement per ISO 7250-1 for normalization.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normalizasyon için ISO 7250-1'e göre boy ölçümü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure de la stature selon ISO 7250-1 pour la normalisation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medición de estatura según ISO 7250-1 para normalización.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قياس الطول وفقًا لـ ISO 7250-1 للتطبيع.

inputs.label: Weight
inputs.businessContext: Body mass for BMI and fat mass calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body mass for BMI and fat mass calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut kütlesi, BMI ve yağ kütlesi hesaplamaları için.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse corporelle pour les calculs d'IMC et de masse grasse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa corporal para cálculos de IMC y masa grasa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة الجسم لحساب مؤشر كتلة الجسم وكتلة الدهون.

inputs.label: Neck Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Key input for body density estimation (Navy method, Lean Six Sigma MSA).

businessContext_i18n.en: Key input for body density estimation (Navy method, Lean Six Sigma MSA).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut yoğunluğu tahmini için ana girdi (Navy yöntemi, Yalın Altı Sigma MSA).
businessContext_i18n.de: Schlüsseleingabe für die Schätzung der Körperdichte (Navy-Methode, Lean Six Sigma MSA).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrée clé pour l'estimation de la densité corporelle (méthode de la Marine, MSA Lean Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Entrada clave para la estimación de densidad corporal (método de la Armada, MSA de Lean Seis Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مدخل رئيسي لتقدير كثافة الجسم (طريقة البحرية، تحليل نظام القياس في اللين ستة سيجما).

inputs.label: Waist Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Abdominal girth for visceral fat risk (WERC ergonomic guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Abdominal girth for visceral fat risk (WERC ergonomic guidelines).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Visseral yağ riski için karın çevresi (WERC ergonomi kılavuzu).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Circonférence abdominale pour le risque de graisse viscérale (directives ergonomiques WERC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Perímetro abdominal para riesgo de grasa visceral (directrices ergonómicas WERC).
businessContext_i18n.ar: محيط البطن لمخاطر الدهون الحشوية (إرشادات WERC المريحة).

inputs.label: Hip Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Required for female body fat calculation (ISO 20685).

businessContext_i18n.en: Required for female body fat calculation (ISO 20685).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kadın vücut yağ hesaplaması için gereklidir (ISO 20685).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Requis pour le calcul de la graisse corporelle féminine (ISO 20685).
businessContext_i18n.es: Requerido para el cálculo de grasa corporal femenina (ISO 20685).

inputs.label: Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity multiplier for energy expenditure (Lean Kaizen continuous improvement).

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical activity multiplier for energy expenditure (Lean Kaizen continuous improvement).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enerji harcaması için fiziksel aktivite çarpanı (Yalın Kaizen sürekli iyileştirme).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für körperliche Aktivität zur Energieverbrauchsberechnung (Lean Kaizen kontinuierliche Verbesserung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur d'activité physique pour la dépense énergétique (amélioration continue Lean Kaizen).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de actividad física para el gasto energético (mejora continua Lean Kaizen).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف النشاط البدني لإنفاق الطاقة (تحسين مستمر كايزن اللين).

rules.message: Waist and hip circumferences must be positive for ratio calculation.
Hip circumference is required for female body fat estimation.
Age must be between 18 and 100 years per ISO 11228-1.
Neck circumference should be less than waist circumference for valid anthropometry.

thresholds.alert: High body fat percentage for male. Consider ergonomic intervention (WERC).
High body fat percentage for female. Health risk per WHO standards.
Elevated waist circumference (>102 cm) indicates metabolic syndrome risk (Lean Six Sigma CTQ).
Elevated waist circumference (>88 cm) indicates metabolic syndrome risk.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
